title: Bridge Essay: Circular causality in volition.
concept: Sense of agency — voluntary action, free will as constructed experience, intentional binding.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nested Agency** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nested agency — voluntary action, free will as constructed experience, intentional binding.
**Phase context:** Sense of agency — voluntary action, free will as constructed experience, intentional binding.

**Circular causality in volition.** — Front Netw Physiol (2025). DOI: 10.3389/fnetp.2025.1631899. PMID: 40740684. Conventional scientific paradigms predominantly emphasize upward causality, often overlooking or dismissing the role of downward causality. This approach is also prevalent in neuroscience, where cortical neurodynamics and higher cognitive functions are typically viewed as consequences of neuronal or even ion channel activity.
